description: A reseller partner submits a new deal registration for a lead they have sourced.

nodes.task_description: Receive the deal registration request from the partner portal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews the submitted lead details.

nodes.task_description: Check the CRM to ensure the lead is not an existing customer or already in the sales pipeline (de-duplication).

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the lead is new and not an existing opportunity.

nodes.task_description: Approve the deal registration, linking the new opportunity to the partner's account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent approves the registration, ensuring the partner will get credit for the deal.
